info.name: DukaanLocker API
info.description:
REST API for fetching and managing FSSAI license information

## Swagger UI
- **Swagger UI**: http://localhost:8081/swagger-ui.html
- **OpenAPI Spec**: http://localhost:8081/api-docs

request.description: Scrapes the FSSAI portal for the given license number and saves the data to the database.

response.name: Success (License Fetched)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "licenseNumber": "12345678901234",
  "businessName": "M/s ABC Traders",
  "address": "123, Main Street, New Delhi - 110001",
  "status": "Active",
  "validityDate": "31-03-2027",
  "licenseType": "Central",
  "pdfPath": "downloads/fssai/12345678901234.pdf",
  "message": null
}

response.name: Validation Error

request.description: Retrieves a previously fetched FSSAI license from the database.

response.name: Success (License Found)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "licenseNumber": "12345678901234",
  "businessName": "M/s ABC Traders",
  "address": "123, Main Street, New Delhi - 110001",
  "status": "Active",
  "validityDate": "31-03-2027",
  "licenseType": "Central",
  "pdfPath": "downloads/fssai/12345678901234.pdf",
  "message": null
}
